message:
Fix respond_contact ORM bug, add scrub patterns, harden ACK TTL decoding

- Replace update!() ORM macro with raw SQL in respond_contact (root cause
  of br-3kwox.1 DATABASE_ERROR — only ORM macro usage in queries.rs)
- Guard respond_contact link_id with proper error instead of unwrap_or(0)
  which could silently no-op the UPDATE WHERE id=0
- Add 5 missing secret detection patterns to scrub.rs: Stripe sk_live_/
  pk_test_, Azure AccountKey/SharedAccessKey, Google AIza API keys, GCP
  service-account private_key_id, npm tokens
- Reorder sk-ant- pattern before generic sk- to prevent dead code
- Add symlink skip to walk_md_files() matching walk_recursive() behavior
- Extract decode_unacked_rows helper with tracing::warn for ACK TTL
  queries that previously silently dropped rows with unexpected types
- Add released_ts TEXT→i64 CASE expression for legacy timestamp compat

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
